title: HallmarkProvenance
description: Provenance envelope attached to AI-generated artifacts by Plan Forge tools. Every field beyond the three required ones is optional; additionalProperties is false to prevent silent schema drift.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version identifier — always the string literal 'hallmark/v1'. Consumers that encounter an unknown version must reject the envelope.

toolName.description: Identifier of the Plan Forge tool or agent that produced the artifact (e.g. 'forge_sweep').

capturedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when provenance was captured — Z suffix required, no timezone offsets.

sourceFile.description: Relative path of the source file the artifact was derived from.

byteRange.description: [startInclusive, endExclusive] byte offsets into sourceFile — start must be <= end.

contentHash.description: sha256:<64 lowercase hex chars> hash of the content slice identified by byteRange.

codeHash.description: sha256:<64 lowercase hex chars> hash of the tool code that produced the artifact — used by forge_hallmark_verify for drift detection.

toolVersion.description: Semantic version string of the tool at capture time (e.g. '2.95.0').
